meaning: n.小麦,小麦色,淡黄色,朴实的人
examples: Wheat was in surplus that year.
He raises 2,000 acres of wheat and hay.
The price of wheat has decreased by 15%.
The residents herded goats, farmed wheat, barley, olives and grapes and built more than 75 windmills.
Expect to find Belgian Trappist, wheat and fruity beers, some 20 draught beers and at least six ales.
